pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support and latest features.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Spring Boot versions may not fully support Java 21 or may have compatibility issues with newer dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace jackson-module-jaxb-annotations with jackson-module-jakarta-xmlbind-annotations to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes in Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed in Java 11 and replaced with jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+. Using the old artifact will cause compile errors or runtime NoClassDefFoundError in a Java 21/Spring Boot 3 environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit jakarta.annotation-api dependency as it is now provided by Spring Boot BOM or JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Redundant dependency management; Spring Boot 3.3+ manages this version automatically.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace maven-compiler-plugin source/target configuration with release configuration for Java 9+ compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the modern standard for cross-compilation and ensures API compatibility with the target JDK version, replacing the deprecated source/target pair.
Newer versions may offer better support for Java 21 bytecode or bug fixes.
Minor version bump for potential bug fixes or feature updates.
Newer versions may offer better support for Java 21 or bug fixes.

src/main/java/org/cyberwarriors/config/C.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt the new Java 21 API.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+ which uses the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors as the container expects Jakarta annotations and descriptors.

src/test/java/org/cyberwarriors/config/t.general_idea: Remove unused static import of java.lang.String.format
Replace String.format call with String.formatted method introduced in Java 15

src/test/java/org/cyberwarriors/service/.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.
